title: Token Exchange Configuration
description: Configuration for the OAuth2 Token Exchange (RFC 8693) extension.

cluster.description: Envoy cluster name configured to reach the token exchange (STS) endpoint.

token_exchange_url.description: Token exchange endpoint URL. Must contain a host and path (e.g. "https://idp.example.com/token").

client_id.description: Client ID for HTTP Basic authentication with the STS endpoint.

client_secret.description: Client secret for HTTP Basic authentication with the STS endpoint.

subject_token_type.description: Token type URI for the input subject token. Defaults to "urn:ietf:params:oauth:token-type:access_token".

resource.description: Target resource URI. Must be an absolute URI without a fragment component.

audience.description: Logical name of the target service.

actor_token.description: Actor token for delegation scenarios. Requires actor_token_type.

actor_token_type.description: Token type URI for the actor token. Required when actor_token is set.

timeout_ms.description: HTTP callout timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 5000.
